current_surface_gaps.gap: Parent name/set/number only; no child printing identity or modern print identity fields.
Legacy parent-card projection omits gv_id, print_identity_key, variant labels, child printings, finish labels, and printing_gv_id.
Direct resolver targets parent card_prints only and cannot resolve exact child printing IDs to parent route context.
Ranked candidate generation starts from the legacy parent-only RPC and cannot reliably rank child printing queries.
Identity filters omit finish-specific child identities such as reverse, holo, pokeball, and masterball.
Mobile fallback search path can disagree with web and does not model child printing result context.

sample_failures.expected: Resolve exact child printing ID to parent route with selected printing context.
Find Espurr parent with Reverse Holo child printing context.
Find Pikachu Master Ball child printing candidates.

recommended_first_build: Wire website API to new RPC.
Update mobile to consume unified result contract.
